desktopCurrent.note: Editable full-page capture; scroll-linked sections represent the initial scroll state in a static Figma frame.

mobileCurrent.note: Editable full-page capture with mobile motion disabled by the implementation breakpoint.

desktopHybrid.note: Current implementation preserved with a limited set of additive UI refinements.

mobileHybrid.note: Current mobile implementation preserved at its exact source width; additive UI remains touch-safe and non-overlapping.

appliedUI: Quick action metadata chips and desktop gold card accents
About and performance context status chips
Unified CTA surface states without changing position or copy
Mobile 44px archive type trigger that preserves the existing CTA row
preserved: Wave transition panels and responsive motion rules
Final wave variants in src/styles/home-section-waves.css: quiet layered paper, stage offset score sheets, finale double navy curtain

decisions.codeConnect: No Code Connect files found for the required components.
decisions.existingFigma: New blank design file; no local screens, variables, or styles.
decisions.libraryReuse: Simple Design System assets were searched but did not match the live brand treatment; the refined proposal uses a local editorial brand treatment without creating a reusable component library.
decisions.fonts: Use Hahmlet as the source-defined Korean fallback because AritaBuri is unavailable in Figma; use Cormorant Garamond for English display text.
decisions.captureGate: Frontend thread confirmed exact 1440/1024/768/430/390 viewport QA, zero horizontal overflow, zero transition borders, zero console warnings/errors, and passing lint/build before capture.
decisions.refinedProposal: Completed full-length editable desktop node 5:24 and mobile node 5:26; full-frame screenshots reviewed successfully.
decisions.currentImplementation: Captured the stable implementation into editable desktop node 19:2 and mobile node 21:2, then removed all temporary capture hooks from index.html.
decisions.hybridBaseline: Desktop node 28:3 and mobile node 28:658 are the implementation baseline: current format 90%, selective additive UI 10%. The earlier Refined pages remain reference-only.
decisions.hybridScope: Only action hierarchy, metadata, status, and archive filtering surfaces were added. Section roots, heights, ordering, wave motion, and storytelling components were not redesigned.
decisions.waveVariantContract: Frontend thread finalized natural wave handoffs in src/styles/home-section-waves.css. Current + UI implementation must treat that file's quiet, stage, finale, fade, responsive echo, reduced-motion, and score-sticky behavior as preserved baseline behavior.
decisions.staticMotionLimit: A full-page Figma frame cannot preserve the website's scroll-driven motion states; the desktop current frame is explicitly treated as an initial-scroll-state reference.
